enter_fortress.title: Locate and enter a Nether Fortress

subtitle.text: Architecture that forgot what its builders wanted.

description: Every culture that built here eventually built something like this.
A structure with no exits because the builders never planned to leave.
Wither Skeletons are what remains of those who stayed.
They do not remember what they were.
They only remember that this place belongs to them.
Navigate the corridors. The blaze spawners are in the lower bridges.
Wither Skeleton Skulls drop at low rate — patience required.
Nether Fortresses generate in all biomes; follow the X-axis if lost.
→ Locate and enter a Nether Fortress [check]
→ Collect 1 Wither Skeleton Skull (rare drop, 2.5% base chance)
